description: Style NoteLinos Perros' sought after contemporary cool is epitomised in this leatherette belt - guaranteed to add a finishing polish to the simplest springtime ensembles. Cinch it around your waist or hips (to suit your outfit's silhouette) and match it with tonal jewellery.Product DetailsSlim belt with a red upperTang clasp and a fixed loop mounted on a steel buckleHoles to customise the FitMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSize and FitLength at largest setting: 95 cm
